characters: Four Demon Lords (as Four Heavenly Kings)
events: Family dinner with Raviel
Raviel handles Yoo Sooha's scandal
Death King goes to school in trauma world
Realizes all students are characters from his life
Four Demon Lords become Four Heavenly Kings delinquents
Receives threatening text: 'The one who murdered me was you'
Student on rooftop prepares to jump
cause_effect: Death King's rising rank causes more immersive penalty
Trauma overlays his memories onto Lefanta Aegim's past
notes: Death King realizes he is the perpetrator/bully in this trauma, not an observer.

events: Student jumps from rooftop
Death King recognizes victim as Constellation Killer's past self
World turns to wasteland when student dies
People take photos of corpse instead of helping
Trauma repeats - Death King wakes up in library again
Death King realizes he is the bully in this scenario
Reads bullying text messages on victim's phone
deaths: Constellation Killer's past self (Kim Yul) - suicide by jumping from rooftop
loops: Trauma repeats multiple times - time loops back to dismissal bell
cause_effect: Each time the student dies, the world collapses and resets
Death King's presence as observer becomes participation as perpetrator
notes: The trauma is Lefanta Aegim's actual school bullying and suicide attempt. The messages on the phone mirror what Death King experienced from Flame Emperor.

events: Flashback to orphanage director's philosophy about masks and love
Death King takes Kim Yul home
Visits Kim Yul's actual home - garbage dump shack
Meets Kim Yul's father (poor trash collector)
Death King apologizes to father for bullying
Death King confronts Bae Hu-ryeong as false father
cause_effect: Director's philosophy about not pretending to love influenced Death King's upbringing
Poverty and broken family system created environment for bullying
notes: The orphanage director was a social worker who took an oath to defend human rights. Death King realizes this world is impossible because Bae Hu-ryeong would never raise a bully.

events: Death King confronts Master as false mother - she fades away
Yoo Sooha appears with squid legs (revealed as monster)
Death King destroys trauma world characters one by one
Characters dissolve into faceless specters
Four Demon Lords destroyed
Children from Hellfire Residence crumble
Crusader is last to dissolve after seeing evidence of bullying
cause_effect: Death King corrupts trauma data by revealing characters' true natures
World collapses as implementation degree decreases
notes: Trauma implementation percentage drops with each character destroyed. The world becomes filled with white noise and faceless specters.

events: World shrinks as Void encroaches
Constellation Killer reveals he feeds animals behind school
Raviel realizes world is fake but kisses Death King goodbye
Raviel disappears into Void
Death King and Kim Yul escape to rooftop
Black Dragon Master follows them
Only three people remain in collapsing world
cause_effect: Corrupted trauma data causes world to collapse into Void
Raviel sacrifices herself to let Death King focus on saving Kim Yul
notes: The animal farm detail was real in Kim Yul's life. The Void represents the erased/unknown parts of the trauma.

characters: Orphanage Director (revealed as true identity of class president)
events: Class president reveals she knew about bullying but was powerless
School board connections protected bullies
Constellation Killer reveals he attempted suicide
Class president cries and begs Kim Yul not to die
Constellation Killer hugs her
Black Dragon Master's face dissolves revealing orphanage director's face
cause_effect: Director's childhood guilt is the core of the trauma
The one bystander who cared was the only real person in the fake world
notes: Major revelation: The orphanage director was Kim Yul's classmate and the only one who tried to help. The rooftop scene where they promised to survive together was the trauma's heart.

events: Death King dies and enters skill selection
Two key skills revealed: Puppeteer's Parade (S) and Salvation of a Torn Goddess (A+)
Puppeteer's Parade reveals Constellation Killer has 13 puppet bodies
Death King regresses 24 hours using Returner's Clockwork Watch
Clears fairy tale world again easily
Asks Count for help contacting outside world
Calls orphanage director for first time in years
cause_effect: Killing Constellation Killer triggers skill copy and regression
Death King uses foreknowledge to clear fairy tale world faster
notes: Constellation Killer's true skill setup revealed. He has 13 puppet bodies with no shared memories.

events: Death King calls orphanage director
Director confirms he attended Shinseo High and was class president
Confirms Kim Yul existed and committed suicide
Reveals Kim Yul's real name: Kim Yul (金律)
Director liquidates all assets and enters Tower
Director meets Constellation Killer
Director kneels and apologizes to Constellation Killer
cause_effect: Director's confirmation proves trauma events were real
Director gives up everything to apologize in person
notes: Kim Yul's name uses hanja 金律 (Kim=gold, Yul=law/principle). The director kept his promise to never change his number.

events: Constellation Killer rejects apology (can't remember being Kim Yul)
Librarian reveals he knows Death King is a regressor
Shows book 'The Tale of the Ascending City' about Death King
Librarian says it's too late to save Constellation Killer
Death King proposes bet with Librarian
If Death King can connect Kim Yul's timeline to Constellation Killer, he wins
If he fails, Librarian gets 10 years with Death King
cause_effect: Librarian's obsession with stories makes him susceptible to bets
Death King proposes immersive return to trauma as solution
notes: Librarian's true name is Hamustra. He records everything about Death King in real-time.

events: Librarian agrees to bet and opens side story
Black smoke emerges instead of white light
Librarian negotiates with Tower/Zrakua's Asin
Death King receives penalty: deployed one year before others
Immersion rate starts at 95%
Death King will be the bully, Constellation Killer will be Kim Yul, Director will be class president
cause_effect: Tower penalty for using shortcut to 50th floor
Higher power (Zrakua's Asin) intervenes in the side story
notes: The trauma is now a proper Apocalypse/side story. Death King enters one year early to prepare.

events: Death King at 95% immersion as bully Hwang Eunseo
Spends 11 months gathering evidence of bullying
Records 103 tapes, 311 videos, 30,790 photos
Collects cell phones with text messages
Sends evidence box to young director's house
Immersion rate reaches 100%
Death King's consciousness fades into bully persona
cause_effect: Death King deliberately becomes the villain to gather evidence
The only way to win is to be defeated as the bully
notes: The chapter shows the meticulous documentation of bullying evidence. Death King endures 11 months of being a monster to create an undeniable record.

events: Fully immersed as Hwang Eunseo
Reveals mechanics of bullying in detail (Levels 1-3)
Explains 'Kim Yul game' and fabricated evidence (shoes with star)
Class president running for student council president
Hwang Eunseo's girlfriend supports the bullying for entertainment
Hwang Eunseo sees himself as superior manipulator
cause_effect: Bullying escalates from ridicule to violence through systematic manipulation
Class president's ambition for college recommendations drives political maneuvering
notes: Detailed explanation of bullying mechanics. The 'star on shoes' trick shows how fabricated evidence spreads. Class president wants Seoul National University recommendation.

events: Broadcasting club president confronts Hwang Eunseo with recording
All customers/friends abandon Hwang Eunseo
Receives threatening texts from former allies
Girlfriend dumps him via text
Constellation Killer appears and says he wants revenge
Kim Yul quotes about beauty and suffering
Tables turned - bully becomes bullied
cause_effect: Evidence leak causes Hwang Eunseo's support network to collapse
Constellation Killer takes control and begins systematic reversal of bullying
notes: The reversal begins. Kim Yul uses the same tactics that were used against him. The broadcasting club president was a 'customer' of the bullying videos.

events: Hwang Eunseo receives hate notes from former friends
Notes mock him using his own tactics
Someone tapes 'Official Trash of Shinseo High' on his back
Girlfriend breaks up via text
Hwang Eunseo searches desks for evidence of culprit
Classmates catch him searching desks
Class president offers to help him apologize to Kim Yul
cause_effect: Hwang Eunseo's paranoia and isolation accelerate his downfall
Class president uses the situation for student council election advantage
notes: The class president's 'help' is revealed to have ulterior motives. Hwang Eunseo's internal monologue shows he feels unfairly targeted despite being the perpetrator.

events: Class president proposes student council election speech
Hwang Eunseo will publicly apologize to Kim Yul during the speech
Hwang Eunseo agrees to help class president win election
They bond over shared cynicism about human nature
Hwang Eunseo writes apology speech
Class president admits he's only helping for election advantage
cause_effect: Hwang Eunseo's desperation makes him vulnerable to manipulation
Class president uses Hwang Eunseo's downfall for political gain
notes: The chapter shows how the class president (Director) was pragmatic even as a teenager. He and Hwang Eunseo share a cynical worldview but choose different paths.
